name: sux
description: Marketplace for the sux MCP connectors: one universal connector (web/data/compute) plus per-domain personal connectors (vault knowledge store; email/JMAP to follow) — each a focused endpoint on the same OAuth-gated Worker, so the universal `sux` surface stays non-personal.

plugins.name: sux-router
plugins.description: The UNIVERSAL sux connector (https://sux.colinxs.workers.dev/mcp) + the `sux` routing skill: web search, scraping/rendering, papers, shopping, documents, transforms, pipe/batch composition. Domain-agnostic. OAuth in-browser via /mcp on first connect.

plugins.name: sux-vault
plugins.description: The PERSONAL Obsidian-vault connector (https://sux.colinxs.workers.dev/vault/mcp): read/write/edit/capture + daily notes over the git-backed knowledge store. A separate endpoint on the same Worker/OAuth so vault tools stay a clean namespace and sux-router stays universal.

plugins.name: sux-mail
plugins.description: The PERSONAL Fastmail connector (https://sux.colinxs.workers.dev/mail/mcp): search/read/thread/send/draft/archive mail, masked-email, plus the raw `jmap` conduit for the full protocol (calendars, contacts). A separate endpoint on the same Worker/OAuth so mail tools stay a clean namespace and sux-router stays universal.

plugins.name: sux-life
plugins.description: The digital-life MEMORY layer — a skill (no new connector) that turns the vault + mail connectors into a second brain: capture in seconds, remember durable facts/people/decisions, recall across notes + mail + files + web with citations, triage the inbox, and consolidate into a linked graph. Git is the undo, so writes are unblocked. Pairs with sux-vault + sux-mail.

plugins.name: sux-files
plugins.description: The PERSONAL file-workspace connector (https://sux.colinxs.workers.dev/files/mcp): list/read/write/upload/share/delete over your Dropbox app folder (scope-is-the-wall), plus the raw `dropbox` escape hatch. Blobs live here; the vault holds the note about them. A separate endpoint on the same Worker/OAuth.
